creator: olivier@gid0.org
text:
2010/9/15 Pav Lucistnik <pav@freebsd.org>:
> Olivier,
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D144857
>
> that PR now have a patch for 0.5.0, do you approve that patch?

Posting again this mail which wasn't cc'ed to bug-followup :

Hello, and thank you again for your patch. I think we're still waiting
for the next xmms2 port update ? Current version in ports is still
libxmmsclient.so.5.
So, still depends on http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/144=
821

Here is the updated distinfo :

--- distinfo.orig       2009-08-19 14:00:08.000000000 +0200
+++ distinfo    2010-09-10 15:50:31.958284218 +0200
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (abraca-0.4-pre2.tar.gz) =3D ccfaf2bb1d01f0ab9915896bdad859c1
-SHA256 (abraca-0.4-pre2.tar.gz) =3D
b2af3a885d6398735c581e43edb45658ed0190e69f99b3f55e7dfa3d6f85ce4b
-SIZE (abraca-0.4-pre2.tar.gz) =3D 155504
+MD5 (abraca-0.5.0.tar.bz2) =3D 6dda77e1eb2d74d045fb90f4987f3b22
+SHA256 (abraca-0.5.0.tar.bz2) =3D
c4caf88e9c0c8d5d51ac5c0df4cc9022a0aa2574a4ff791dea11c7e212b766e2
+SIZE (abraca-0.5.0.tar.bz2) =3D 402497

>
> --
> Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
